data.title: Assassin’s Creed developer Ubisoft pushes back earnings report after audit red flags
data.description:
Ubisoft announced a delay in the release of its earnings report due to some mistakes found during an audit. A mistake in Ubisoft’s records discovered during an audit has led to the company breaking certain loan agreements. The company also has to make a restatement of its earnings. Red flags found during audit of Ubisoft […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ubisoft-pushes-earnings-report-after-audit/

data.title: Migrate.fun, in collaboration with OKX and PayAI, completed the migration of AA wallet tokens.
data.description: Migrate.fun officially announced that, in close collaboration with OKX and PayAI Network, it has successfully completed the migration of PayAI tokens for DEX trading users on the OKX exchange. During this migration, Migrate.fun focused on enhancing support for the AA wallet scenario, providing standardized migration infrastructure services to PayAI, reducing migration costs for the project team, and ensuring the stability and asset security of OKX users during the token migration process.

data.title: Raoul Pal Explains the Crypto Situation: Which Pattern Bitcoin Is Repeating Now?
data.description:
Raoul Pal says the current crypto correction isn’t just another dip, it’s a textbook example of rapid deleveraging, liquidity stress, and forced unwinds.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/raoul-pal-explains-the-crypto-situation-which-is-the-pattern-bitcoin-is-repeating-now/

data.title: U.S. Consumer Sentiment Index Shows Slight Improvement in November
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the final reading of the University of Michigan's Consumer Sentiment Index for November in the United States was reported at 51. This figure slightly exceeded expectations, which were set at 50.5, and showed an improvement from the previous value of 50.3.

data.description: Market news: A Goldman Sachs partner stated that there are signs of a bullish sell-off in US stocks, and selling will continue before the market stabilizes. (Jinshi)

data.title: Arthur Hayes transferred 19.872 million BIO tokens to Binance one hour ago.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, after unlocking and claiming 12.212 million BIO (US$730,000) from the BIO ownership contract, BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes transferred 19.872 million BIO (US$1.2 million) to Binance one hour ago.

data.title: The final reading for the US one-year inflation rate in November was 4.5%, down from 4.70% previously.
data.description: The final reading of the US one-year inflation rate for November was 4.5%, compared to 4.70% previously. US wholesale sales rose 0.1% month-on-month in August, below the expected 0.4% and the previous reading of 1.4%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Today, US Bitcoin ETFs saw a net outflow of 7,341 BTC, and Ethereum ETFs saw a net outflow of 84,435 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US Bitcoin ETFs saw a net outflow of 7,341 BTC, with BlackRock experiencing an outflow of 4,108 BTC and currently holding 779,425 BTC; 9 Ethereum ETFs saw a net outflow of 84,435 ETH, with BlackRock experiencing an outflow of 43,237 ETH and currently holding 3,604,966 ETH.

data.title: Federal Reserve Officials' Remarks Stir Market Reactions
data.description:
According to Odaily, several senior officials from the Federal Reserve have delivered speeches providing the latest insights into monetary policy prospects, inflation trends, and the impact of emerging technologies on the financial system. The remarks highlighted significant internal disagreements within the Federal Reserve regarding the timing of interest rate cuts. These statements have caused market fluctuations and adjustments in expectations.

Analyst Adam Button noted that after Federal Reserve official Williams suggested that "given the current slightly restrictive policy, a rate cut may still be possible in the near term," U.S. stocks have received substantial buying support. Williams' dovish signals have intensified the debate over interest rate policies, raising the probability of a December rate cut by the Federal Reserve to approximately 60% and putting pressure on the dollar's performance.

data.title: Trust Wallet has launched a "Gas Sponsorship" feature, sponsoring gas fees for over $100 million in swap transactions for its users.
data.description: Trust Wallet has officially launched its "Gas Sponsorship" feature. Users on the BNB Chain and Solana Chain can have their gas automatically paid by Trust Wallet, even if they don't hold the native tokens (BNB, SOL) or have insufficient gas funds. This helps users complete transactions smoothly without worrying about failed transactions or additional top-ups. Currently, Trust Wallet has sponsored over $100 million in swap transactions for its users. BNB Chain supports up to 4 gas-sponsored transactions per day with no minimum amount; Solana Chain supports up to 4 gas-sponsored transactions per day, with a minimum transaction amount of approximately $200. Trust Wallet is a leading self-custodied Web3 wallet, supporting over 10 million assets across 100+ blockchains, with over 200 million downloads globally. It is understood that Ethereum and other major public chains will also soon launch this feature and support gas-sponsored transfers.

data.title: Coinbase to buy Solana’s trading platform Vector.fun
data.description:
Coinbase acquired the Solana-based marketplace Vector. fun. The Tensor Foundation, which launched and governed the DEX, will remain independent and focus on the Tensor NFT marketplace.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-buy-sol-trading-platform-vector-fun/

data.title: Michael Saylor responds to MSCI exclusion risk: Index classification cannot define strategy
data.description: Michael Saylor, founder and executive chairman of Strategy, responded to questions about the risks of being excluded from the MSCI index in a post on the X platform. He stated that Strategy, as a publicly traded and operating company, is fundamentally different from funds, trusts, and holding companies. Strategy not only has a $500 million software business but also uniquely uses Bitcoin as productive capital in its fund management. Index classification cannot define Strategy. The company has a clear long-term strategy, a firm belief in Bitcoin, and its mission remains to become the world's first digital currency institution based on sound money and financial innovation.

data.title: Federal Reserve officials are speaking out in quick succession: hawks and doves are at loggerheads, and the probability of a December rate cut is soaring.
data.description: Several senior Federal Reserve officials delivered speeches, providing the market with the latest insights into the outlook for monetary policy, inflation trends, and the impact of emerging technologies on the financial system. Their remarks revealed significant internal divisions within the Fed on the core issue of when to cut interest rates. The Fed officials' speeches triggered market volatility and adjustments in expectations. Analyst Adam Button stated that US stocks received substantial buying support after Fed official Williams indicated that "given the current policy being somewhat restrictive, a rate cut is still possible in the near future." Williams' dovish signals reignited the debate over interest rate policy. His comments pushed the probability of a Fed rate cut in December to approximately 60%, putting pressure on the dollar. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Milan: If he becomes the key voter, he will support a 25 basis point rate cut.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Mirren said on Friday that yesterday's (US September non-farm payrolls) data had a "clearly dovish" impact. Mirren pointed out that the current lack of data does not mean we have no forecasts; we should be forecast-oriented, not data-oriented. Mirren stated, "If my vote is the deciding factor, I will support a 25 basis point rate cut." Mirren believes that labor market data was not as strong as expected, and CPI data is not expected to be released until after the next FOMC meeting. (Jinshi)

data.title: US stocks opened with mixed results for the crypto sector, with Coinbase rising 1.31%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, the Dow Jones Industrial Average opened 165 points higher, the S&P 500 rose 0.38%, and the Nasdaq Composite gained 0.47%. The crypto sector was mixed, with Coinbase up 1.31%, BitMine up 0.32%, Circle down 0.66%, and Strategy up 0.05%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.
